Package global.thalion.ttio.exporters

Class ImzMLWriter

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.exporters.ImzMLWriter
public final class ImzMLWriter extends Object
imzML + .ibd exporter — v0.9+.

Reverses ImzMLReader: takes a list of pixel spectra plus grid metadata and emits the canonical paired .imzML + .ibd files. Supports both continuous mode (shared m/z axis once at the head of the .ibd + per-pixel intensity arrays) and processed mode (per-pixel m/z + intensity arrays).

The emitted XML uses the canonical IMS accessions that real-world imzML files (pyimzML test corpus, imzML 1.1 spec) use: IMS:1000080 for UUID, IMS:1000042 / 1000043 for max pixel counts. Output round-trips through our ImzMLReader bit-identically and is readable by pyimzml.

Cross-language equivalents:
Python: ttio.exporters.imzml · Objective-C: TTIOImzMLWriter

  • Method Details

    • write

      public static ImzMLWriter.WriteResult write(List<ImzMLReader.PixelSpectrum> pixels, Path imzmlPath, Path ibdPath, String mode, int gridMaxX, int gridMaxY, int gridMaxZ, double pixelSizeX, double pixelSizeY, String scanPattern, String uuidHex)
      Write pixels as an imzML + .ibd pair.
      Parameters:
      pixels - List of ImzMLReader.PixelSpectrum.
      imzmlPath - Destination .imzML path.
      ibdPath - Optional .ibd path; null => derive by swapping extension.
      mode - "continuous" or "processed".
      gridMaxX - /Y/Z Pixel grid extents (0 => derive from pixel coordinates).
      pixelSizeX - /Y Pixel size in micrometres; 0 => omit cvParam.
      scanPattern - Free-text scan pattern ("flyback", etc.).
      uuidHex - Optional UUID string (dashes/braces tolerated); null => random UUID4.

    • writeFromImport

      public static ImzMLWriter.WriteResult writeFromImport(ImzMLReader.ImzMLImport imp, Path imzmlPath, Path ibdPath)
      Round-trip helper: re-emit an ImzMLReader.ImzMLImport.
